stemHtml: A twin engine turbofan aircraft uses dual channel FADEC. Which of the following statements correctly describes the operation of each channel?

options.a: Each channel processes different data; one channel for inputs and the other for outputs.
options.b: One channel serves the ECU and the other serves the hydro-mechanical control unit.
options.c: Each channel controls the engine on that side, and data is sent to the other channel.
options.d: One channel is in command, and the other channel can take control of the engine if deemed necessary.
